'''Sarylcorp''' was a manufacturing company that produced technological components for [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Among their products were the [[reactant agitator injector]] used on [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]<ref name="SWS" /> and the [[Particle Motivator]] used in [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems']] [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]].<ref name="XVT" />
